channel.title: CarShake
channel.description: Valet Damage Proof & Vehicle Handover App — three-stop protocol: scan the car before valet, QR-coded handover receipt, and post-retrieval scan to prove condition. Court-admissible timestamps and photos for valet operators, rental car companies, and parking facilities.

item.title: CarShake — Never Pay for Valet Damage Again. AI Car Scans, Free.
item.description: 60-second AI-powered car scan before valet. QR handover proof between you and the attendant. Free — no app download. Used by 1,822+ drivers saving thousands.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Frequently Asked Questions — CarShake
item.description: Everything you need to know about CarShake: pricing, how scans work, QR handover, legal evidence, and more.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: CarShake Pricing — Free Valet Protection
item.description: Free plan includes 3 scans per month. Shield+ at $2.97/month for unlimited scans, PDF reports, and priority support.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Vehicle-Specific Valet Parking Protection — CarShake
item.description: Find the right valet protection guide for your vehicle type. SUV, sedan, truck, luxury, EV, and family vehicle guides.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Trust & Security — CarShake
item.description: SHA-256 hashing, GPS verification, server timestamps. Your car condition data is secure and admissible as evidence.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: How CarShake Works — AI-Powered Car Protection
item.description: Scan your car in 60 seconds. QR handover proof. AI compares every angle at pickup. Free, no app download needed.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: CarShake vs The Alternatives — Why Evidence Matters
item.description: Why CarShake beats camera photos, dash cams, insurance claims, and valet inspections. The only tool with AI-verified, QR-confirmed, court-admissible...
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Valet Parking Protection by City — CarShake City Guides
item.description: Find your city guide for protecting your car at valet parking. AI-verified car condition scans available in 40+ US cities.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Valet Parking Protection Blog — CarShake
item.description: Tips, guides, and updates about valet parking protection, car damage prevention, and AI-powered documentation.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Protect Your Pickup Truck at Valet — CarShake
item.description: Full-size trucks have unique valet risks: bed rails, tailgates, and step bars. AI-verified documentation.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Protect Your SUV at Valet Parking — CarShake
item.description: SUVs are high-value valet targets. AI-verified condition scans before & after. Document your Escalade, Tahoe, or Grand Cherokee in 60 seconds.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Protect Your Sedan at Valet Parking — CarShake
item.description: Compact and mid-size sedans get overlooked. AI-verified documentation catches every valet scratch.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Protect Your Minivan or Family Vehicle at Valet — CarShake
item.description: Family vehicles get the most daily use. AI-verified scans protect your family car at valet.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Protect Your Luxury or Exotic Car at Valet — CarShake
item.description: Luxury and exotic cars need special protection at valet. AI-verified documentation for Ferraris, Lamborghinis, Bentleys, and more.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Protect Your Electric Vehicle at Valet — CarShake
item.description: EVs have unique valet risks: glass roofs, charging ports, sensors. AI-verified documentation for Teslas, Rivians, Lucids.
item.dc:creator: CarShake

item.title: Valet Parking Liability in Wisconsin — CarShake Legal Guide
item.description: Learn about valet parking bailment laws, liability limits, and statute of limitations in Wisconsin. Protect your car with AI-verified documentation.
